title: codereview-pass-3: missing Y2K38 tests for time subsystem
description: Reviewed tests in lichen/tests/* for time (puck_location, hal, gateway_status). No tests for Y2K38/2038 rollover, 32-bit time_t edge cases, or post-2038 behavior despite saturation tests using UINT32_MAX. Completeness gap for the time fix.
